import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import os
import warnings

# =============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION & DATA PATHS
# =============================================================================
os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

# Publication-quality styling
plt.rcParams.update({
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'savefig.dpi': 300,
    'font.size': 14,
    'axes.titlesize': 16,
    'axes.labelsize': 15,
    'legend.fontsize': 13,
    'xtick.labelsize': 13,
    'ytick.labelsize': 13,
    'axes.linewidth': 1.2,
    'lines.linewidth': 2.0,
    'lines.markersize': 6
})

# Key numeric results extracted from JSON summaries (replace with actual values)

    "baseline_final_accuracy": 0.824,
    "research_final_accuracy": 0.891,
    "ablation_best_accuracy": 0.876,
    "target_threshold": 0.850,

}
